data.name: Lovesome Stay
data.detailed_description:
Main Story:

Upon receiving news of his father's illness, Lin Ye hurried back to China. His mother entrusted him with the management of the family's homestay business. How will Lin Ye turn around the struggling, neglected homestay with its incomplete facilities? During this process, how will he encounter six girls, each with their own unique personality? What kind of stories will unfold between them and the protagonist...

Gameplay:

An interactive visual novel centered around straightforward and intuitive homestay management and development. Progress through the story to experience humorous and heartwarming love stories with the main female characters.

 Main Characters:

Bai Shuang'er, Lin Ye's childhood friend, trusted partner, and confidante.

Su Yao, an ice queen and married painter who is cold on the outside but warm on the inside.

Song Xiaoxuan, cute yet strong, with a pure and delicate appearance but a powerful inner core.

Chen Yue, gentle like water, bringing a spring-like warmth to everyone she meets.

 The following characters are in development, please stay tuned:

             Chen Youyou, a rebellious and free-spirited personality, competitive and stubborn, somewhat incongruous between her words and thoughts.

             Michelle, a friend of Lin Ye's from his study abroad days, rumored to have not always looked this way.

data.short_description: Lin Ye, a graduate who studied abroad, returns home after a failed entrepreneurial venture to inherit his family's business and revive a nearly bankrupt guesthouse. In the process, he meets six girls with different personalities and embarks on a journey with them.
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文*, 英文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows® 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows® 10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows® 10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 9 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows® 10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
